response: To expedite the registration of a Avatrombopag medicinal product in Russia and streamline the process of conducting bioequivalence studies, we propose organizing an international clinical trial that includes Russia as an additional site for patient recruitment. For this, we require the following from your team: 1. Access to the full clinical trial protocol currently utilized in India, to align our methodologies and ensure consistency in data collection and analysis. 2. Results and data from the bioequivalence studies conducted with your participants, which will serve as a reference point for our integrated analysis. Based on the combined data, we will prepare a summary report for the clinical trial's registration in Russia.
